name: Graveyard Pudding Dessert
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (4 serving size) chocolate instant pudding
1 package (16 oz.) chocolate sandwich cookies, crushed
Decorations: assorted rectangular-shaped cookies, decorator icings, candy corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the cold milk into a large bowl.
2. Add the two packages of chocolate instant pudding to the milk.
3. Beat the mixture with a wire whisk or electric mixer on the lowest speed for 2 minutes, or until fully blended.
4. Gently stir in the whipped topping and half of the crushed chocolate sandwich cookies.
5. Spoon the mixture into a 13x9 inch dish.
6. Sprinkle the remaining crushed cookies on top.
7. Refrigerate the dessert for at least 1 hour before serving.
8. Decorate rectangular-shaped cookies with icing to create tombstones.
9. Place the tombstone cookies upright in the dessert, using candy pumpkins as gravestones.
This recipe makes 15 servings.
